description: Runs a cheap representative UI degradation canary set for unavailable/malformed IPFS metadata, platform API, personalization services, indexer empty/lagging/failing states, slow/failing chain RPC, and wrong-chain wallet state.

data.label: UI operations/degradation canaries
command: IPFS metadata|metadata is unavailable|IPFS gateway down|normalizes network failures|malformed|platform API is unavailable|falls back to the curated collection|newcomer-completable discovery path|no channels match filters|empty message when no projects are returned|displays error message when API call fails|hides loading spinner after error|content error|statement content not found|RPC degradation|Wrong-chain degradation|prompts a switch
